analysis: Baseline model using ResNet-18 FPN with 0.2m BEV resolution. The model achieved a validation loss of 1.6160 (Focal + L1). It effectively learned the structural features from the LIDAR density maps and demonstrated that CenterPoint BEV architecture works reliably well for 3D regression. We will now proceed to inject Semantic-Cartesian positional encodings to further constrain vehicle localization.
